purpose: Routes all marketing-related AI work for Effectime. Read SYSTEM.md first, then use this file to identify which specialist file handles a specific task.

sections.name: strategy
sections.purpose: Positioning, GTM, channels, offer strategy, founder-led growth

sections.name: research
sections.purpose: Market research, competitor analysis, ICP/persona definition, pain mapping, JTBD

sections.name: messaging
sections.purpose: Brand messaging, value propositions, feature-to-outcome translation, proof assets, narrative

sections.name: content
sections.purpose: Founder content, SEO articles, case studies, LinkedIn posts, email nurture, webinars, sales enablement content

sections.name: campaigns
sections.purpose: Campaign architecture, LinkedIn ads, retargeting, events, guerrilla, product launches

sections.name: visual
sections.purpose: Visual brand system, website art direction, ad creatives, social visuals, case study visuals, infographics

sections.name: website
sections.purpose: Homepage, landing pages, solution pages, industry pages, comparison pages, conversion copy

sections.name: sales
sections.purpose: Sales deck, one-pager, demo scripts, objection handling, proposals

sections.name: analytics
sections.purpose: Measurement framework, funnel KPIs, attribution, experiment backlog

sections.name: governance
sections.purpose: Terminology guardrails, content quality checklist, visual quality checklist, brand safety, localization rules

sections.name: marketing_values
sections.purpose: Per-feature marketing impact log. One file per product release documenting marketable outcomes, claim types, content angles, and persona relevance. Bridge between product development and marketing.
sections.note: New file must be created alongside every versioning/*.md delivery artifact.

workflow: 1. Read SYSTEM.md for doctrine and routing
2. Read relevant marketing_values/ entries for current product capabilities
3. Use strategy/ files to define or confirm positioning
4. Use research/ files to ground messaging in real audience insight
5. Use messaging/ files to build the message architecture
6. Use content/ files to produce written assets
7. Use visual/ files for design direction and AI image prompts
8. Use website/ files for conversion-focused copy
9. Use campaigns/ files for demand generation planning
10. Use sales/ files for pipeline-accelerating materials
11. Use analytics/ files to define and track performance
12. Use governance/ files to review all outputs before publishing

agentRouting.repoWriter: Claude repo writing agent — reads outputs from other agents and writes library files
